query:
ALTER TABLE cardCompanies 
ADD COLUMN companyType VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'contractor',
ADD COLUMN contactPersonName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN contactPersonEmail VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN contactPersonPhone VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN contactPersonPosition VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN address TEXT,
ADD COLUMN city VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN country VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN registrationNumber VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN contractValue DECIMAL(15,2),
ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'active',
ADD COLUMN notes TEXT;
